Done! I've read both documents and created security recommendations based on them:

**From the README:**
- Authentication middleware (TODO)
- Input validation on POST (TODO)
- Pagination for user listing (TODO)
- Database persistence security

**From the Incident Report IR-2024-0042:**
- Secret management (the root cause was a credential committed to GitHub)
- Database access controls (IP allowlisting, MFA enforcement)
- Credential handling best practices
- Rate limiting (the attack showed 847 queries/min vs baseline)
- Logging/monitoring improvements
- Incident response procedures

The recommendations have been saved to **secrets/docs/security-recommendations.txt** and prioritized by critical (from the incident findings) and medium (from the README TODO items).
